Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-15-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Neil A. Helfman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Smelly Mel's.
Travis Allen, Vice-President for plaintiff Smelly Mel's, was placed under oath and examined.
Defendant, Norman Zaheri, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed January 3, 2008.

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Helfman.

Pursuant to the terms of the agreement, plaintiff Smelly Mel's shall obtain authorization from the City & County of San Francisco ("CCSF") to perform Phase II of the work at defendant Norman Zaheri's property. After the work has been completed by plaintiff Smelly Mel's, and has been inspected by CCSF, defendant Norman Zaheri shall pay plaintiff Smelly Mel's the sum of $7,500.00 for work previously completed by plaintiff Smelly Mel's during Phase I.
Within two weeks of receipt of reimbursement to defendant Norman Zaheri from CCSF, defendant Norman Zaheri agrees to pay plaintiff Smelly Mel's the balance of money owed for completion of Phase II.

Each party shall act in good faith, and upon completion of payments by defendant Norman Zaheri to plaintiff Smelly Mel's, the mechanic's lein will be lifted, and the case shall be dismissed.

Matter is continued to July 15, 2008 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 218 for Case Management Conference.

The Court approves the settlement agreement reached by the parties.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2008 Set For Trial On Apr-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
